summary: Frontend-only testing of new PersonalizedHero and PetAuraAvatar components on Shop and Services pages. All features tested and verified working correctly. Both pages display magical, emotionally-connected hero sections with time-based greetings, soul traits pills, pet avatar with glow, and personalized search when logged in.
critical_code_review_comments: PersonalizedHero.jsx - Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes (personalized-hero, hero-search-input, hero-voice-btn)
PetAuraAvatar.jsx - Properly implements personality-based glow colors and animations for energetic/calm/loving/playful/royal/wise personalities
ShopPage.jsx and ServicesPage.jsx both correctly integrate PersonalizedHero component
Services page breed selector works without errors - tested with Golden Retriever selection
All pillar filters (Celebrate, Care, etc.) work correctly on both pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: PersonalizedHero component works on both Shop and Services pages. When not logged in, it shows generic content ('Shop for Your Pet' / 'Premium Pet Services'). When logged in with testuser@test.com, it shows personalized content for pet 'Max' (Golden Retriever) including greeting, soul traits pills, and breed-specific taglines.

shop_page_logged_in.breed_tagline: PASS - 'Curated with love for Max the Golden Retriever'
shop_page_logged_in.soul_traits_pills: PASS - 'Good boy/girl', 'Loved unconditionally', 'Family member' all visible
shop_page_logged_in.pet_aura_avatar: PASS - Glowing avatar with energetic personality icon

services_page_logged_in.breed_tagline: PASS - 'Premium services chosen for Golden Retrievers like Max'
services_page_logged_in.breed_specific_mira_whispers: PASS - Services show breed-specific descriptions like 'Puppy-proofing tips for energetic Retriever pups'

personalized_hero_shop.subtitle: Curated with love for Max the Golden Retriever
